Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.commons.settings

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.commons.settings
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.commons.settings
Thread-safe system property access with support for global and per-thread overrides, making it useful for unit tests and configuration management.
org.apache.juneau.commons.utils
Common internal utilities.
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot
Spring Boot Integration
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.settings used by org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
    Class
    Description
    Settings
    Encapsulates Java system properties with support for global and per-thread overrides for unit testing.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.commons.settings used by org.apache.juneau.commons.settings
    Class
    Description
    ArgsPropertySource
    Property source backed by Args.
    FunctionalPropertySource
    A functional interface for creating read-only PropertySource instances from a function.
    FunctionalPropertyStore
    A writable PropertyStore implementation created from functional interfaces.
    ManifestFilePropertySource
    Property source backed by ManifestFile.
    PropertyLookupResult
    Tri-state result of a property lookup.
    PropertySource
    Interface for pluggable property sources used by Settings.
    PropertySourceProvider
    Provider SPI for augmenting Settings with additional property sources.
    PropertyStore
    A writable extension of PropertySource that supports modifying property values.
    Setting
    A memoizer that provides convenience methods for type conversion.
    Settings
    Encapsulates Java system properties with support for global and per-thread overrides for unit testing.
    Settings.Builder
    Builder for creating Settings instances.
    StringSetting
    A specialized Setting for string values that provides convenience methods for type conversion.

    Description

    A specialized Setting for string values that provides convenience methods for type conversion.
